desc: a `ref="box"` colliding with an $expose verb `function box` must not mint a duplicate binding: the exposed verb name is public contract (feeds the handle), so the renameable side is the INTERNAL ref — React/Svelte rename the ref local to `boxRef`, Angular renames the viewChild field to `boxRef`, Lit's ref is the prefixed `_refBox` — the exposed `box` stays intact
